raw_text:
ERROR   [TC-B-002] interface.f90:2 <-> header.h:2
  RETURN_TYPE: Fortran REAL(c_float) returns 4-byte float in XMM0[31:0].
  C prototype declares return type 'double' (8 bytes). Caller reads 8 bytes;
  upper 32 bits are undefined. Silent garbage result.

ERROR   [TC-B-002] interface.f90:2 <-> header.h:2  param[0]/param[1]
  PARAM_ORDER: Fortran has (x, n); C has (n, x). Parameters are swapped.
